title: SWD club cricket action for 24 and 25 January
description: CRICKET NEWS - The club cricket action in...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The club cricket action in the SWD league competitions will continue this weekend.

Saturday 24 January

• Premier league: New Dawn Park vs Union Stars I; Sussex vs George; Harlequins Forces vs Knysna Cavaliers; Union Stars II vs Pacaltsdorp United

• Promotion league: Thembalethu vs Mossel Bay; Pirates United vs Ramblers; Ladismith vs Heidelberg United; Riversdale vs George B

• Reserve league division 1: Bongolethu vs Union Stars B, Beaufort West A vs Harlequins Forces C; Kwanonqaba vs Western Hope; Melkhoutfontein vs Hartenbos

• Women’s league division 1: Sussex vs Knysna Cavaliers

Sunday 25 January

• Women’s league division 1: Pacaltsdorp United vs George

• Reserve league division 2: Calitzdorp Young Stars A vs Harlequins Forces B; Ramblers B vs Hartenbos B; Mossel Bay B vs Sussex B; Beaufort West B vs Western Hope B, Knysna Cavaliers C vs Plett Pioneers C; Knysna Cavaliers B vs Pirates United B; George D vs Pacaltsdorp United C; Sussex C vs George C

• Women’s league division 2: Harlequins Forces vs Plett Pioneers; Thembalethu vs Dysselsdorp.


> With the premier league competition that already reached its half-way stage, the log positions are:


1st - Sussex: 29 points (8 matches)

2nd - Knysna Cavaliers: 26 points (8 matches)

3rd - Pacaltsdorp United: 22 points (6 matches)

4th - Union Stars: 20 points (8 matches)

5th - George: 13 points (7 matches)

6th - Union Stars II: 12 points (8 matches)

7th - Harlequins Forces: 10 points (6 matches)

8th - New Dawn Park: 2 points (7 matches)


> In the promotion league, the log standings of the top four teams are:


1st - Pirates United: 25 points (6 matches)

2nd - Ramblers: 22 points (6 matches)

3rd - Mossel Bay: 17 points (6 matches)

4th - Plett Pioneers: 15 points (5 matches)
